programme.desc: Further coverage from the first round on the first day of the tournament, which takes place in Yushan, China. programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

programme.title: Hot Tea Hot Tea Kalau Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Zulfa and Kevin were forced to look for partners at a matchmaking agency, but they were betrayed by their respective partners. Because Zulfa and Kevin both needed partners for a mission, the matchmaking agency suggested that they work together.

programme.title: Apa Harus Dipatok Ayam Biar Dinotice
programme.desc: Just as they were about to get back together, Farah (Glenca Chysara) saw Doni (Qausar Harta Yudana) being affectionate with another girl. But Doni said that Farah had misunderstood. Farah didn't want to forgive him just like that. As a result, Doni was asked to take care of chickens as a sign of his sincerity.

programme.title: Trio Gabut Kursus Iman (Spesial Ramadan)
programme.desc: The story begins with three young men, Billy, Ge, and Qausar, who are wanted by the police for allegedly practicing illegal circumcision. programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.desc: Midun, who was in the midst of a passionate romance with Mira, was extremely annoyed with Mira's grandmother, who constantly criticized him, saying he was reckless, had no future, and was rude, to the point of interfering in his relationship with Mira.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mahasiswa Abadi Kuliah Jurusan Cinta

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When Detective Benson faces Lewis in the courtroom, the stress causes setbacks in her recovery; Benson is forced to reveal secrets.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A teenager is sexually assaulted and left for dead in an alley after attending a movie star's party; Benson is suspicious when security footage from the party goes missing.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A distraught pregnant woman threatens suicide, claiming that her child is a product of rape, but when the case goes to trial, the woman's willingness to settle for cash makes detectives suspicious.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler must rely on a psychiatrist (Mary Stuart Masterson) and her schizophrenic patient to find the man behind a number of assaults on the Upper West Side.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler hunts for a missing 14-year-old girl who may have been abducted by a foreign child pornographer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Evidence points to an angry ex-boyfriend when a cocktail waitress is murdered outside a popular nightspot.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler probe an assault and carjacking, only to find that it is connected to illegal trafficking in painkillers apparently headed by an elderly woman (Melinda Dillon).

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A car accident involving two foster children leads detectives Beck and Stabler to the foster parents and questionable medical practices involving a controversial "rebirthing" therapy.

programme.desc: The trial of an accused child molester is jeopardized when the prime witness has difficulty dealing with his past.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The investigation of a young woman's death reveals that she and other women were recently accused of a raping a male stripper.

programme.desc: An attacker rips a fetus from a woman's womb, launching the detectives on a frantic search in hope that the baby survived.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A boy, 6, is shot and then abandoned in an emergency room by his fearful mother, sending detectives in search of his missing family and the gunman.

programme.desc: Benson and Stabler have the gruesome task of identifying the remains of a man and woman who were stabbed in a park.

programme.desc: Benson and Stabler clash with an assistant U.S. attorney (Pam Grier) when their rape victim and their prime suspect disappear into witness protection.

programme.desc: The death of a baby leads the detectives to a smuggling operation that hides cocaine in baby formula.

programme.desc: It tells the story of Mutiara, who must struggle hard in order to live a decent life. programme.title: Bioskop Malam Seru (Upon The Magic Roads)
Billionaire Story
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Hello Mr. Billionaire
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A windfall from the sky! A down-and-out goalkeeper suddenly inherits a massive fortune, but to claim it, he must spend one billion within a month. What follows is a money-burning challenge filled with chaos, comedy, and endless laughs, where spending money becomes the hardest task of all.

programme.title: Destined
programme.desc: Lin Yu Ru, the daughter of a cloth merchant who's suffered childhood hardships and she is married to Gu Jiu Si who is the notorious son of Yangzhou's wealthiest family, infamous for his indolent ways. They grow closer despite their differences.

programme.title: AI Romantic
programme.desc: Ah Bao (Ali Lee), a high-end AI, accidentally got lost when leaving the factory and happened to land into Gu family. Ah Bao assisted Gu family with various strange tasks. At the same time, she detects a computer virus that may terminate her life.

programme.title: Perfect Match 12
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China.
